MOTION TO STRIKE 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-24-2003 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Jonathan T. Rodriguez, Esq. of SEDGWICK, DETERT 781-7900, for defendants and moving party
Craig K. Martin, Esq. of 245-2300, for plaintiff and opposing party

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court denied DEFENDANTs NHP Management Co., Shoreview APARTMENTS LP and Apartment INVESTMENT MANAGEMENT CO.'S MOTION TO strike AMENDED COMPLAINT. The Court vacated the default and allowed plaintiff to file 1st amended complaint as to causes of action 1, 2, 3 and 6. Plaintiff has leave to move to amend to add claims for fraud and physical disability if there is a good faith factual basis. Defendant's request for sanctions was granted. (DAG/301/EH) Reporter: Joseph Vickstein, CSR 4780
